policies.name: Offset CMYK Strict (FOGRA51)
policies.description: Commercial offset printing. Full CMYK conversion, strict compliance.

policies.name: Digital Print-on-Demand
policies.description: Print-on-demand for books and short runs. Flexible color acceptance.

policies.name: Digital Premium Color
policies.description: Premium digital printing for color books and marketing materials.

policies.name: Screen Print / Garment
policies.description: Screen printing for garments and merchandise. Spot color enforcement.

policies.name: Large Format / Signage
policies.description: Banners, signage, and large format printing. Relaxed resolution requirements.

policies.name: Large Format RGB Safe (Signage)
policies.description: Banners and signage. RGB allowed, lower DPI threshold.

policies.name: Packaging (Spot/Diecut Allowed)
policies.description: Packaging printing. Spot color whitelists for CutContour, Varnish, etc.

policies.name: Book Print (Cover vs Interior Rules)
policies.description: Book printing. Stricter rules for interior text blacks, fonts, and overprinting.
